strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Track record of founding open-source platforms and leading workshops, indicating thought leadership and knowledge sharing
concerns: Title history tops out at Staff/Senior Software Engineer with no Principal, Director, or strategic-advisory roles
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no recognized AI products, publications, or advanced AI degree
Cloud experience appears applied (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than at the platform-strategy or cutting-edge advisory level expected

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: The candidate brings strong, broad engineering experience and early engagement with AI-agent tooling, plus entrepreneurial signals through GISCollective and community teaching. However, the role targets a Director-level individual contributor shaping AI strategy for cloud platforms and advising strategic customers, which calls for recognized AI expertise and prior principal/advisory scope that are not evident here. Fit is partial: solid builder credentials, but a gap against the AI-leadership and strategic-influence bar of the role.
